He co-founded OpenAI in 2015 as a nonprofit to benefit humanity… and now he’s exposing how they completely betrayed that mission.

Musk dropped the hammer: He feels like a https://t.co/rvKXPh5jOY

Aku setuju banget sama kalimat ini:

“Banyak orang jadi nggak menarik setelah kita tahu cara pikir mereka.”

Dan mungkin itu kenapa aku selalu kagum sama orang yang cara pikirnya luas, tenang pas ngomong, dan ngerti gimana jadi manusia, bukan cuma sekadar hidup. Yang open minded

SAM ALTMAN CALLED OPENAI A "COMPANY" TO ELON MUSK'S FACE IN 2015.

Elon stopped him cold.

"OpenAI is structured as a 501(c)3 nonprofit."

Not a company. A nonprofit. Built specifically so no one would ever profit from it.

Sam nodded.

Then spent the next 10 years running it. https://t.co/9sodTAH78M
